description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a duck, featuring a detailed feather texture across its body with intricate patterns in shades of brown and black. The head is slightly lighter, with a distinct orange beak and dark eyes, giving it a lifelike appearance. The wings are tucked against the body, with subtle hints of blue and white visible on the feathers. The tail is short and slightly pointed, blending seamlessly with the rest of the body. The overall form is smooth and rounded, mimicking the natural posture of a duck at rest. The surface finish appears matte with a slight roughness, suggesting a painted or molded material.
description: A lifelike, brown-feathered duck with an orange beak and detailed feather patterns, resting with wings tucked in. The surface is matte and slightly textured, resembling a real duck.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the duck, highlighting the feather details and the orange beak.
description_view_1: Rear view emphasizing the rounded tail and the symmetry of the wings folded against the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile, with visible feather texture and the beak angled slightly downward.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the duck's face, beak, and the rounded chest, giving a sense of the duck's width.
